title: UltrillaCraft
description: A Vanilla+ Modpack attempting to be my perfect version of the game, whilst respecting Mojang's Original Vision of Minecraft
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/JHwaRJSL9DQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
UltrillaCraft (Ultra Vanilla Minecraft) is a Vanilla+ Modpack attempting to be my perfect version of the game, whilst also respecting Mojang's Original Vision of Minecraft.

List of mods included in this pack:
- [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvQzSEkH) by Snownee
- [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/OVuFYfre) by FoundationGames
- [Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/aC3cM3Vq) by Ivan Molodetskikh (YaLTeR)
- [Architectury](https://modrinth.com/mod/lhGA9TYQ) by shedaniel
- [Dungeons and Taverns](https://modrinth.com/mod/tpehi7ww) by NovaWostra, Konci, Walls
- [JamLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/IYY9Siz8) by Jamalam
- [Advancement Plaques](https://modrinth.com/mod/9NM0dXub) by Grend

[Complementary Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound) with [Euphoria](https://modrinth.com/mod/euphoria-patches) is recommended if you are able to run it (Included in pack).
